jobs.title: Director, Customer Education
jobs.content: <div class="content-intro"><h4><strong>What's in it for you?&nbsp;</strong></h4><p>Calendly empowers individuals, teams, and organizations globally to ship more value through smart scheduling.</p><p><strong>The Role:</strong></p><p>The Director of Customer Education partners with Marketing & Product to design Calendly's scheduling-automation enablement curriculum.</p>

jobs.title: Sr. Director, Engineering
jobs.content: <p>Calendly is reimagining the meeting-link-and-availability data model.</p><p><strong>The Role:</strong></p><p>The Sr. Director of Engineering owns the Calendly-for-Teams enterprise-scheduling platform across server-side pipelines.</p>
